help_page.title: Help & Guide
help_page.intro: A quick guide to using Butcher Cashier.

sections.heading: Dashboard
sections.body: See today's order count, current low-stock alerts, and how many products you're tracking.

sections.heading: New Order
sections.body: Pick a product, enter the weight in kg, and add it to the cart. The total updates live, and the server checks stock automatically before saving the order.

sections.heading: Orders
sections.body: View every past order and its total.

sections.heading: Inventory
sections.body: View all products. Once logged in, you can also add new products and edit the price or stock of existing ones.

sections.heading: Login
sections.body: Sign in with your email and password to create orders or manage inventory. Logged-out visitors can still view orders, inventory, and the dashboard.

sections.heading: Language
sections.body: Use the EN/AR button in the top bar to switch the interface language at any time.

orders_page.please_login: Please log in to view orders.

new_order_page.title: New Order
new_order_page.error_pick_product: Pick a product and enter a valid kg amount.
new_order_page.error_add_item: Add at least one item to the order.

inventory_page.reason_placeholder: Reason for stock change (restock, correction, shrinkage…)
inventory_page.error_reason_required: A reason is required when changing stock.

dismantle_page.subtitle: Record a carcass breakdown against a template and see the yield variance.
dismantle_page.no_access: You don't have permission to record dismantle events.
dismantle_page.error_no_outputs: Enter at least one cut's actual weight.

admin_users_page.title: User Management
admin_users_page.subtitle: Manage roles and permissions
admin_users_page.confirm_demote_message: You're changing your own role away from Admin. You'll lose access to this screen until another admin restores it.
